issues.description: Lid seals on inbound pallet fail visual; estimated 3-5% of cases impacted. Vendor accepted return.
issues.resolution: RA issued; replacement shipment received 9 days later

issues.description: Multiple customer complaints of underfilled jars (declared 8oz, average 7.3oz). Spot-check at FC confirmed.
issues.resolution: Vendor adjusted line tolerance; follow-up audit scheduled but not yet completed

issues.description: Updated formulation includes peanut oil. New label does not declare peanut in Contains statement. Quarantined at FC.
issues.resolution: Vendor reprinting labels; quarantined inventory still on hold as of report date

issues.description: Customer reports of bitter / rancid flavor. Lots tested; tahini oxidation suspected. Within stated shelf life.
issues.resolution: Vendor agreed to shorten declared shelf life by 60 days and add nitrogen flush. Spec update pending.

issues.description: Two jars from inbound pallet contain visible black particulate. Suspected gasket fragment. Pallet held pending vendor RCA.
issues.resolution: RCA submitted; vendor cites worn equipment, replacement parts in transit. CAPA not yet closed.

issues.description: Pattern of dented jars in single lot. Pallet handling investigation inconclusive.
issues.resolution: Vendor reinforced corner packaging; no recurrence.
